vibe: Fresh, youthful, new, ironic, active, community-driven

typography.notes: Use tracking-tight for large headings. Keep text-5xl/6xl max. Do not center everything; use asymmetry. Use font-light and font-black for contrast.

layout_spacing.cards: Subtle border with p-8 inside to avoid text collision, no harsh shadows, soft rounded corners (rounded-3xl).

components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9ECD4]/80) with clear CTA.
components.hero: Hero overlay: abstract threads_background. Large typography 'Ogni filo conta'. CTA buttons.
components.activities_section: Bento grid overlapping cards. 4 categories: Aperitivi Sociali, Passeggiate, Screening, Corsi IT. Use alternating background colors like #5CB176, #92C8B9, #429DD0, #F59E0B.
components.events_list: List or bento grid with high contrast cards. Clear 'Partecipa' buttons.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized inputs. Rounded forms with bordeaux or green accents.
components.footer: Large bold text, dark background (#551118), contrasting text (#F9ECD4).

motion.scroll: Parallax on background images. Staggered fade up for grid items using framer-motion.

graphics.motif: Intertwining threads and spiderwebs. Use raw SVG paths with stroke-dasharray animations for threads connecting sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Update tailwind.config.js to include these in fontFamily.
Implement Lucide React icons, especially for the spider/spiderweb theme. Use `<Network>`, `<Activity>`, `<Share2>` as thread/web decorations.
Create a custom logo component: Text 'APS Trama Viva' next to an SVG of a spider/spiderweb using #551118 or #5CB176.

Hero Section: Use the 'hero_bg' image with a glassmorphic or soft cream overlay (#F9ECD4/80). Feature the tagline 'Intrecciamo storie, persone e opportunità. Ogni filo conta.' in large, bold typography.

Activities Section Layout: Use an asymmetric 'Tetris' bento grid. Do not center everything. Break the conventional grid. Assign alternating background colors to cards: #5CB176, #92C8B9, #429DD0, #F59E0B.
Forms: Use Shadcn UI for the 'Iscrizione soci' and 'Contatti' forms. Customize them with rounded corners and the brand colors.
Navbar: Sticky with backdrop-blur-xl and a background of rgba(249, 236, 212, 0.8). Must have a clear 'Iscrizione' CTA.
Footer: Contrast heavily! Use Night Bordeaux (#551118) for the background with Soft Cream (#F9ECD4) text. Include Instagram link (@tramavivaaps).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements: buttons, links, form inputs.
Animate the page using framer-motion: sections should fade and slide up, cards should scale subtly on hover.
Decorate the negative space with SVG squiggly lines or spiderwebs mimicking 'threads' (fili) spanning across sections.
Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment, and use generous padding (e.g. p-12, py-24).
